scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,bot -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/discord-bot"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/discord-bot
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,bot -c blue,green "npm start -w apps/backend" "npm start -w apps/discord-bot"
